tasks.label: git: auto-pull every minute
tasks.detail: Keeps the clone current with the repo's automated commits; skips while the working tree is dirty
tasks.command: while true; do if [ -z "$(git status --porcelain)" ]; then git pull --ff-only --quiet || true; fi; sleep 60; done

windows.command: while ($true) { if (-not (git status --porcelain)) { git pull --ff-only --quiet }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 60 }
